seo.geo_hook: NYX Chat Security Hall of Fame recognizes elite white-hat hackers and researchers who responsibly disclose vulnerabilities in our zero-knowledge architecture. Our bug bounty program focuses on E2EE bypasses, Signal Protocol integrity, WebAuthn PRF key security, and Argon2id blind indexing hash collisions.

meta.title: Security Hall of Fame | NYX Chat
meta.description: Honoring the elite security researchers and white-hat operatives who help secure the NYX Zero-Knowledge architecture.

hero.title: The Elite Operatives.
hero.subtitle: Security is not a state of rest; it is a continuous operation. We honor the cryptographers and researchers who successfully breach our walls and responsibly report it.

protocol.title: Reporting a Vulnerability
protocol.warning: DO NOT OPEN A PUBLIC ISSUE
protocol.p1: Under no circumstances should you report critical security vulnerabilities via public GitHub Issues or PRs. Doing so compromises all active NYX deployments.
protocol.p2: Please report any suspected vulnerabilities directly to the core command at admin@nyx-app.my.id. We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and begin drafting a hotfix in a private sandbox.

scope.title: Target Priorities
scope.out_3: UI/UX bugs with no privacy impact.
scope.out_4: Theoretical flaws without a Proof of Concept (PoC).
